steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The claim is that the house is 'remote and solitary.' The answer must supply textual evidence of isolation — a description that visually shows nothing else around it.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: describes Oz, not Kansas — irrelevant to the setting of the house. ✗
  • Choice B: also describes Oz, not the Kansas landscape. ✗
  • Choice C: names residents of the house but shows no isolation from surroundings. ✗
  • Choice D: depicts 'nothing but the great gray prairie on every side' and 'not a tree nor a house' — directly evidencing barrenness and isolation. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
